    Application Overview

    Powerful Features

    Discover what makes NovaTrade AI the ultimate crypto trading companion

    AI Trading Bots

    Create and configure intelligent trading bots that analyze market conditions and execute trades automatically based on your strategy preferences.

    Real-Time Analytics

    Monitor your portfolio performance with comprehensive charts, profit/loss tracking, and detailed trade history all in one dashboard.

    DEX Sniping

    Get early entries into new token launches with our intelligent sniping system. Set parameters and let the AI find the best opportunities.

    Risk Management

    Set stop-loss, take-profit, and maximum position sizes. Our AI monitors 24/7 to protect your capital from unexpected market moves.
